name: Korg NTS-1 mkII
use: Synth sounds, FX processing, step sequencer, loadable oscillators/FX via logue SDK
overview: DIY programmable synthesizer kit. Digital oscillator (sawtooth, triangle, square, VPM, noise, User OSC), analog-modelling filter, EG, LFO, 3-slot effects chain (MOD + DELAY + REVERB), and 8-step sequencer. Custom oscillators and effects load via Nu:Tekt/logue SDK.
workflow: Connect USB-C power → play notes on ribbon keyboard
<kbd>OSC</kbd> button → turn <kbd>TYPE</kbd> to pick waveform → turn <kbd>A</kbd> (Shape) and <kbd>B</kbd> (Sub volume)
<kbd>FILTER</kbd> button → turn <kbd>TYPE</kbd> for filter type → <kbd>A</kbd> = Cutoff → <kbd>B</kbd> = Resonance
<kbd>REVERB</kbd> button → <kbd>TYPE</kbd> = reverb type → <kbd>A</kbd> = time → <kbd>B</kbd> = wet mix
<kbd>ARP</kbd> button → toggle arp on/off; long-press to latch; hold <kbd>ARP</kbd> + <kbd>TYPE</kbd> to pick pattern
Sequencer: long-press <kbd>SEQ</kbd> button → step recording mode; use keyboard to input notes one at a time
Set tempo: hold <kbd>ARP</kbd> + turn <kbd>B</kbd> knob (56–240 BPM); hold <kbd>REVERB</kbd> on power-on = global settings

shortcuts.action: Select waveform: sawtooth, triangle, square, VPM, noise, User OSC ★
LFO depth for Pitch or Shape modulation
Audio INPUT mode: select In Mode / In Level
Mod index — intensity of the modulator
Select mod FX: Chorus, Ensemble, Phaser, Flanger
Select delay: Stereo BPM, Mono BPM, Ping BPM, Hi BPM, Tape BPM
Select reverb: Hall, Plate, Space, Riser, Submarine
Latch arp (keeps running without holding keyboard) ★
Arp pattern: Up, Down, Up-Down, Converge, Random, etc.
Enter step recording mode (SEQ LED blinks) ★
Select playback pattern: Forward / Reverse / Bounce / Stochastic / Random ★
Set gate time for all steps (S1–S100)
Set gate time for current step (L1–L100, TTIE=tie)

tips: VPM oscillator: simple carrier+modulator — VPM A = index (brightness), B = ratio (harmonic content). FM-like timbres
SEQ playback: Stochastic = probabilistic step order (random but weighted); great for generative melodies
User OSC: load any logue SDK oscillator from nutekt.org — completely replaces the internal oscillator type
BPM delays (Stereo BPM, Tape BPM etc.) sync automatically when you change tempo via ARP+B knob
